## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new GrowthX account lead and review recent performance.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Katya Luscomb is the new GrowthX account lead, taking over from Matthew Panzarino, who remains available for support.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [Performance is strong: Monograph reached 90.8k weekly sessions, and GrowthX content hit 1k weekly sessions, with no quality trade-offs.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [New keyword research for the upcoming "Leads" product is complete and ready for Allison Terres's review.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)

## Topics

### Account Handoff & Introduction

  - [Katya Luscomb is the new primary contact for Monograph, taking over from Matthew Panzarino.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [**Katya Luscomb:** Managing Editor at GrowthX, now moving into client strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [**Matthew Panzarino:** Remains available for context and support.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)

### Performance Update

  - [Performance is strong, with no significant impact from a recent Google algorithm update.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Monograph:** 90.8k weekly sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [**GrowthX Content:** 1,000 weekly sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [**Quality:** No engagement dips, confirming views are not being traded for lower-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [**Full Report:** The monthly performance report is scheduled for December 3rd.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

### New Keyword Research (Leads Product)

  - [GrowthX completed keyword research for the upcoming "Leads" product, based on the provided product spec.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [The research document contains overlapping and highly relevant keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Allison Terres reviews the keywords → GrowthX adds approved assignments to Airtable for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Allison Terres:** Review the new keyword research document for the "Leads" product.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Upon approval, add keyword assignments to Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Continue delivering and publishing new articles this week.](https://fathom.video/share/CRyszZSuZ9G8yAEc5Ua8UCXek7YiEFx3?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
